meaning: n.一致,符合,调和,协定;vt.一致,给与;vi.符合
examples: These results accord closely with our predictions.
This action would not be in accord with our policy.
He did not quit as France's prime minister of his own accord.
People at lower risk actually did seem to do better in ACCORD, he says.
Instead of pitting one drug against another, both ACCORD and ADVANCE used drug combos.
